title: Workflows Family Schema
description: Phase 1 Step 4 Wave 3 — populated workflows family schema. Eight seeded workflow templates from Contract §17.1–§17.8 (5 MVP: Startup, Closeout, Permits, Inspections, Responsibility Matrix; 3 Deferred: Owner Contract Matrix, Subcontractor Scorecard, Lessons Learned). Captures responsibility / due-date / evidence / status fields and stage-gated transitions; ProjectStatus archive behavior bound by VR-09. Per-row workflow records inherit §16.1 baseline columns from the lists family. Field set traces verbatim to fields/families/workflows.fields.json. mvp_status binds to the canonical Decision Closure four-value enum (VR-24). seedRule, when present, keys strictly on ProjectType (VR-08).

workflowTemplateKey.description: Stable identifier for one of the 8 seeded workflow templates.

workflowDisplayName.description: Display name for the workflow template.

owningModule.description: Module that owns this workflow template. VR-26 referential integrity.

seedListMappings.description: List(s) seeded by this workflow template (e.g., Project Startup Tasks, Startup Gate Checklist for §17.1).

seedRule.description: Vertical seeding rule keyed strictly on ProjectType. VR-08. Vertical seeding never keys on ProjectStage.

stageGate.description: Stage / status that gates the workflow (e.g., active_construction → closeout). ProjectStatus archive behavior bound by VR-09.

mvpStatus.description: Decision Closure status: 'Frozen for MVP' for §17.1–§17.5 templates; 'Deferred' for §17.6–§17.8 templates.

startupTask_TaskNumber.description: Task number on Project Startup Tasks list (§17.1).

permits_seedSet.description: Permit type seed set per §17.3 (Master, Roofing, Plumbing, HVAC, Electrical, Fire Alarm, Fire Sprinklers, Elevator, Irrigation, Low Voltage, Site-Utilities, Right-of-way).

inspections_seedGroups.description: Inspection group seed set per §17.4 (35 groups).

ownerContractMatrix_ResponsibleParty.description: Owner Contract responsible party (§17.6). Workflow Deferred from MVP.

subcontractorScorecard_Categories.description: Subcontractor scorecard categories with literal weights from §17.7 (20%, 20%, 20%, 15%, 15%, 10%). Workflow Deferred from MVP.

lessonsLearned_Category.description: Lessons Learned category enum (§17.8). Workflow Deferred from MVP.

lessonsLearned_Impact.description: Lessons Learned impact enum (§17.8). Workflow Deferred from MVP.

decisionClosureStatus.description: Canonical Decision Closure Register status — VR-24.

startupTaskSection.description: Project Startup Tasks section enum from §17.1.

responsibleParty.description: Owner Contract Responsibility Matrix party enum from §17.6.

subcontractorScorecardCategory.description: Subcontractor scorecard categories from §17.7 (literal weights live in source contract).
